nasb.text: Jeshua became the father of Joiakim, and Joiakim became the father of Eliashib, and Eliashib became the father of Joiada,

esv.text: And Jeshua was the father of Joiakim, Joiakim the father of Eliashib, Eliashib the father of Joiada,

cnv.text: 耶書亞生約雅金，約雅金生以利亞實，以利亞實生耶何耶大，

ccb.text: 耶书亚生约雅金，约雅金生以利亚实，以利亚实生耶何耶大，
